meta.title: Brazil Abroad — Your road map to the world

freeOffering.title: Everything you get for free.
freeOffering.app_desc: I built this app from scratch with everything I learned in 15 years of hospitality. Practice interviews in English, simulate real shifts, scan your level, generate your international CV and more. Completely free while in development — use it now.
freeOffering.item1: Free assessment + personal road map by email
freeOffering.item4: Weekly blog with news and opportunities

about.label: About Ricardo
about.title: Built by someone who lived it.
about.p1: 15 years in hospitality. 7 in Dubai's luxury scene — Atlantis The Royal, Amazónico and Casa Blanca. I've seen who makes it abroad and who doesn't.
about.p2: The difference is never luck. It's preparation and the right connection. That's why I created Brazil Abroad.
